'''maluju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackmans|crackmans]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackmans|crackmans]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maluju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mælijith|mælijith]] || [[word:mælijij|mælijij]] || [[word:mælijish|mælijish]] || [[word:mæliji|mæliji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:malulujuth|malulujuth]] || [[word:malulujuj|malulujuj]] || [[word:malulujush|malulujush]] || [[word:maluluju|maluluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:malujuth|malujuth]] || [[word:malujuj|malujuj]] || [[word:malujush|malujush]] || [[word:maluju|maluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:malufjuth|malufjuth]] || [[word:malufjuj|malufjuj]] || [[word:malufjush|malufjush]] || [[word:malufjuf|malufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:malujuthu|malujuthu]] || [[word:malujuju|malujuju]] || [[word:malujushu|malujushu]] || [[word:malujuku|malujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:malujuth|malujuth]] || [[word:malujuj|malujuj]] || [[word:malujush|malujush]] || [[word:maluju|maluju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:malujuthul|malujuthul]] || [[word:malujujul|malujujul]] || [[word:malujushul|malujushul]] || [[word:malujukul|malujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:malujuthuthu|malujuthuthu]] || [[word:malujujuju|malujujuju]] || [[word:malujushushu|malujushushu]] || [[word:malujuku|malujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:malujuthun|malujuthun]] || [[word:malujujun|malujujun]] || [[word:malujushun|malujushun]] || [[word:malujukun|malujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:malujuthuoro|malujuthuoro]] || [[word:malujujuoro|malujujuoro]] || [[word:malujushuoro|malujushuoro]] || [[word:malujukuoro|malujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
